prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: STRUCTURE OF TC14; A C-TYPE LECTIN FROM THE TUNICATE POLYANDROCARPA MISAKIENSIS. Entity description: PROTEIN (POLYANDROCARPA LECTIN). Organism: Polyandrocarpa misakiensis. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived low-complexity tendency high; sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency; public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V69 E65 metadata context marks: assembly_context cofactor_context ligand_context membrane_context_strong metal_context oligomer_context partner_copy_context topology_evidence transmembrane_context. Known E65 marks are allowed; hard-topology discovery labels are withheld from prediction. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
